subject: [PATCH v10 05/15] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag called VM_UFFD_RWP to the Linux kernel, which enables read-write protection for userfaultfd (Uffd) ranges. This extends the existing write-protection feature of Uffd to also trap reads on protected ranges. The flag is gated by CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP and is currently not set or queried anywhere in the codebase. The patch introduces new helpers and updates various files, including documentation, to support this new feature.
